mnemonics: INSTALL: Infrastructure Needs, Sizing, Testing, Approvals, Logistics, Launch
keyPoints: Thoroughly assess hardware and software requirements before procurement
Create a detailed implementation plan with rollback procedures
Perform post-installation validation and performance testing
commonMistakes: Underestimating resource requirements leading to performance issues
Failing to test the installation process in a non-production environment
Neglecting to document the installation process for future reference
